arts.ttl: Shearer includes Newcastle star ahead of Anthony Gordon in TOTW, also hails two Leicester players
arts.sum: There was no Anthony Gordon however...

arts.ttl: Gateshead FC rocked by Rob Elliot exit as ex-Newcastle United keeper joins Crawley Town
arts.sum: The former Republic of Ireland international will be joined Broadfield Stadium by Heed player-assistant manager Louis Storey and first-team coach Anthony Sweeney after the trio travelled to Sussex after overseeing a final training sessions with the Gateshead squad on Monday morning. Elliot, player assistant manager Louis Storey and Heed head of recruitment Luke Clark were forced into a mid-season rebuild of their squad after several loan signings were recalled by parent clubs and key forward Stephen Wearne followed Williamson to Milton Keynes.

arts.ttl: Newcastle youngster Mason Miley bursts on to the scene as youth team beat Liverpool 3-2
arts.sum: Jamie Miley had said it was the family ambition for all three brothers to one day star for the first-team. Also on show was the younger brother of Lewis and Jamie Miley.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer plan hit by Everton sale and Newcastle could now suffer too
arts.sum: Speaking of Branthwaite who saw action in the 2-1 win over Crystal Palace on Saturday, Dyche shared, "First things first, in allowing him the chance to get in and play as we did today and allow him to get to full Premier League fitness," adding, "I don't think there's too much wrong with his game so I'll just monitor him as I see it and so will the staff." Manchester United may have a tough time persuading Everton to part with star defender Jarrad Branthwaite, according to recent reports and that may have a knock-on effect on Newcastle United .

arts.ttl: Paul Mitchell wants Newcastle to sign talented attacker from one of his former clubs
arts.sum: Newcastle United director Paul Mitchell is reportedly keen to strengthen Eddie Howe’s attack and is eyeing up a potential raid on his former club Monaco for talented young winger Maghnes Akliouche. The 22-year-old has long been highly rated as a top young player emerging in French football, and it could be that we’ll soon see […] The post Paul Mitchell wants Newcastle to sign talented attacker from one of his former clubs appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle ready to outbid Euro giants in the race to sign 24-year-old hattrick hero
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly keen on signing Jonathan David from French outfit LOSC Lille. According to TuttoJuve, Newcastle United will compete with Inter Milan and Juventus for the 24-year-old Canadian international striker. They are reportedly the favourites to get the deal done and they are prepared to outbid the two Italian clubs in order to […] The post Newcastle ready to outbid Euro giants in the race to sign 24-year-old hattrick hero appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United ready to pounce for potential Chelsea transfer raid
arts.sum: Newcastle United reportedly have an interest in highly-rated young Chelsea defender Josh Acheampong as they look to continue a transfer policy that has worked well for them. Acheampong is the latest talent come up through Chelsea’s academy, but one imagines the 18-year-old is going to face a struggle to play regularly in the Blues first-team […] The post Newcastle United ready to pounce for potential Chelsea transfer raid appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 3 Monaco stars Paul Mitchell could target in Newcastle's January transfer plans
arts.sum: Mitchell says Newcastle will look to 'undervalued talent' to bolster their ranks, having struggled with the resale value of players. The former AS Monaco chief has made clear the Magpies will look to find better value in the market in the upcoming transfer window after missing out on Marc Guehi this summer.

arts.ttl: 'Hybrid': Jamie Carragher says Newcastle have a 'fantastic' player who is excelling in three positions
arts.sum: Despite enduring what turned out to be an underwhelming summer transfer window, Newcastle United have enjoyed a solid start to the 2024-25 Premier League campaign....

arts.ttl: The genius pre-season move that inspired Joelinton's 'hybrid' switch as third Newcastle centre-back
arts.sum: When Eddie Howe told Joelinton to drop into a centre-back position during the pre-season rout of Urawa Red Diamonds, the move almost went unnoticed. "Joelinton started high up the pitch then he was looking after Rico Lewis and filling space as a third centre-back and it was almost like a back five.
